report.name: PENPRN_INSTANCE1_ETEAEP_DA

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_DOMAIN_TYPE, COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO||'-'||TO_CHAR( PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPL_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR'), PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID, DECODE(REG_INSURED.SEX, 'Α', 'του ασφαλισμένου ' , 'Θ', 'της ασφαλισμένης ') DECODED_SEX , REPLACE(SURNAME,'''', '') ||' '||REPLACE(NAME,'''', '') FULLNAME, REG_INSURED.FATHER_NAME, REG_INSURED.MOTHER_NAME, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE, REG_INSURED.amka_id, REG_INSURED.taxation_id, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR, REG_INSURED.date_of_birth date_of_birth_dir FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_QC_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE;

dataItem.name: DECODED_SEX
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Reg Insured Sex Α Του Α

dataSource.name: Q_4
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), MAX(TO_DATE(30||'/'||nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000))), SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY='2' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE GROUP BY PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE,COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataItem.name: MAX_TO_DATE_30_nvl_MONTH_1_nv2
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max To Date 30 Nvl Month 1 Nv2

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( TO_DATE ( 30 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 1000 ) ) )

dataItem.name: MIN_TO_DATE_1_nvl_MONTH_12_nv3
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 1 Nvl Month 12 Nv3

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_5
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 2

dataSource.name: Q_6
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 1

dataSource.name: Q_7
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_NAME, REG_INSURED.AMKA_ID AMKA_WIFE, REG_INSURED.TAXATION_ID TAXATION_WIFE FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS,PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE!='00001' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE=PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE ORDER BY PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE

dataSource.name: Q_8
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_9
dataSource.select:
SELECT AMOUNT_DESCR AMOUNT_DESCR, AMOUNT AMOUNT, SUM_INDICATOR SUM_INDICATOR, CALCULATION_FLG CALCULATION_FLG FROM PEN_DEC_AMOUNT_ANALYSIS WHERE DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= '1' AND DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR ORDER BY SEQ_NO ASC;
/*SELECT ' ' AMOUNT_DESCR, 1 AMOUNT, ' ' SUM_INDICATOR, ' ' CALCULATION_FLG FROM DUAL;*/

dataSource.name: Q_10
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_17
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code IN ('00070', '00071') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00116'

dataSource.name: Q_20
dataSource.select: SELECT com_pension_institutions.pension_inst_name FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, com_pension_institutions WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00070' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00010' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=com_pension_institutions.PENSION_INST_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_24
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_DESCR FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_DEATH_REASON WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00035' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00049' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_26
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00013'

dataSource.name: Q_27
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00014'

dataSource.name: Q_28
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.PAYMENT_END_DATE, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, DECODE (PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.DEDUCT_FLG, NULL, 'ΠΛΗΡΗ', 'ΜΕΙΩΜΕΝΗ'), PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_PRODUCTS, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QCPRODINS_QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID= PEN_ACCOUNT.INS_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO;

dataSource.name: Q_29
dataSource.select:
SELECT TRANS_DESCR TRANS_DESCR_P1, MIN(INSURANCE_FROM) INSURANCE_FROM_P1, MAX(INSURANCE_TO) INSURANCE_TO_P1, SUM(INSURANCE_DAYS) INSURANCE_DAYS_PI FROM ( SELECT COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, CASE WHEN PEN_INSURED_DAYS.insurance_days_category = '3' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.YEAR = 1800 THEN MIN(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.from_working_date,'mm/yyyy'),'MM/YYYY')) ELSE MIN(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(MONTH||'/'||YEAR),'mm/yyyy')) END INSURANCE_FROM, CASE WHEN PEN_INSURED_DAYS.insurance_days_category = '3' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.YEAR = 1800 THEN MAX(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.to_working_date,'mm/yyyy'),'MM/YYYY')) ELSE MAX(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(MONTH||'/'||YEAR),'mm/yyyy')) END INSURANCE_TO, SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL) INSURANCE_DAYS FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.Acc_Account_No = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.Ins_Insured_Id = :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL != 0 GROUP BY PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, PEN_INSURED_DAYS.insurance_days_category , PEN_INSURED_DAYS.YEAR ) GROUP BY TRANS_DESCR ORDER BY SUBSTR(MIN(INSURANCE_FROM),4,4), 1 ASC
/*SELECT distinct TO_DATE(CHAR_COL2,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_TO_ORD, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHAR_COL1,'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'MM/YYYY') INSURANCE_FROM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHAR_COL2,'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'MM/YYYY') INSURANCE_TO, NUM_COL1 INSURANCE_DAYS, CHAR_COL3 TRANS_DESCR, CHAR_COL4 DESCRIPTION, CHAR_COL5 DESCRIPTION FROM PEN_WEBFORMS_RG WHERE 1=1 AND :P_SID IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_COL3 IS NOT NULL AND SID=:P_SID AND RG_NAME = 'RG_NAME1' ORDER BY 1 ; */ /*SELECT ' ' INSURANCE_FROM, ' ' INSURANCE_TO, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS, ' ' TRANS_DESCR, ' ' DESCRIPTION, ' 'DESCRIPTION2 FROM DUAL; */

dataSource.name: Q_30
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO2

dataSource.name: Q_31
dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_32
dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_33
dataSource.select: SELECT ' 'SPRE_CODE, ' 'SPRE_DESCR, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS_SPRE_FINAL FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_34
dataSource.select:
SELECT MIN(INSURANCE_FROM) MIN_INSURANCE_DATE_G7, MAX(INSURANCE_TO) MAX_INSURANCE_DATE_G7, SUM(INSURANCE_DAYS) INSURANCE_DAYS_g7 FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY = '3' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.YEAR = 1800 THEN MIN(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.FROM_WORKING_DATE,'mm/yyyy'),'MM/YYYY')) ELSE MIN(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(MONTH||'/'||YEAR),'mm/yyyy')) END INSURANCE_FROM, CASE WHEN PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY = '3' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.YEAR = 1800 THEN MAX(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.TO_WORKING_DATE,'mm/yyyy'),'MM/YYYY')) ELSE MAX(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(MONTH||'/'||YEAR),'mm/yyyy')) END INSURANCE_TO, -- CHRYS 16/4/2024 APO CHRIS_PAP HD2024-1555 SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL) INSURANCE_DAYS SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL) INSURANCE_DAYS -- CHRYS 16/4/2024 APO CHRIS_PAP HD2024-1555 FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE = COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE -- CHRYS 16/4/2024 APO CHRIS_PAP HD2024-1555 AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL != 0 AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL != 0 -- CHRYS 16/4/2024 APO CHRIS_PAP HD2024-1555 GROUP BY PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY , PEN_INSURED_DAYS.YEAR )
/*SELECT SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL), MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(1||'/'||NVL(MONTH,1)||'/'||NVL(YEAR,1000)))) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL IS NOT NULL AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL!=0; */

dataSource.name: Q_67
dataSource.select: SELECT WORKING_INS_REDUCTION, WORK_INS_CHILD_INCR, DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', ' ΣΤΟΝ ΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ','Δ','ΣΤΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ/ΕΥΡΥΤΕΡΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ','Α','ΜΕ ΑΥΤΟΑΠΑΣΧΟΛΗΣΗ',WORK_INS_SECTOR), DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', ' 63 Ν.2676/99','Δ','8 Π. 14 Ν. 2592/98',WORK_INS_SECTOR), DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', 'ΣΤΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΠΟΥ ΥΠΕΡΒΑΙΝΕΙ ΤΑ 733,68 ΕΥΡΩ','Δ','ΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ',WORK_INS_SECTOR), Excess_Amount, Work_Ins_Sector SECTOR, Initial_Amount, Final_Amount, Children_Num, limit_amount_for_excess FROM PEN_ACCOUNT_WORKING_INFO WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO;

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_ΣΤΟΝ_
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Work Ins Sector Ι Στον

dataDescriptor.expression: DECODE ( WORK_INS_SECTOR , 'Ι' , ' ΣΤΟΝ ΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ' , 'Δ' , 'ΣΤΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ/ΕΥΡΥΤΕΡΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ' , 'Α' , 'ΜΕ ΑΥΤΟΑΠΑΣΧΟΛΗΣΗ' , WORK_INS_SECTOR )

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_ΣΤΟ_Π
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Work Ins Sector Ι Στο Π

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_63_Ν_

dataSource.name: Q_68
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code IN ('00070', '00071') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00119'

dataSource.name: Q_69
dataSource.select: select DEBT_ID, DEDUCTION_PENSION_FACTOR, DOSAGE_AMOUNT, TOTAL_DEDUCTION_AMMOUNT, b.descr, rownum num_debt from PEN_DEC_INSTANCE_DEBTS a, ppi_deduction_types b WHERE DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE= :p_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND DT_DECISION_YEAR= :p_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO and a.DEBT_ID=b.code(+) AND a.STATUS='1'

dataSource.name: Q_70
dataSource.select: select distinct round(a.average_income,2) synt_misthos_a_aponemon, round(a.total_years,2) eth_asfalisis_a_aponemon, 0 v_perc_ksb_a_aponemon, round(a.average_income * a.total_years * 0.45/100,2) amount_a_aponemon, 0 incr_amount_a_aponemon from pen_calc_adapod_results_eteaep a where a.account_no = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and a.institution_code = penbat_find_introd_instit_code(:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO) ---για απονεμων and nvl(a.v_percent_ksb,0) = 0 and nvl(a.average_income,0) <> 0 and year <= 2014 union all select distinct round(a.average_income,2) synt_misthos_a_aponemon, round(a.total_years,2) eth_asfalisis_a_aponemon, a.v_percent_ksb v_perc_ksb_a_aponemon, 0 amount_a_aponemon, round(a.average_income * a.total_years * a.v_percent_ksb * 0.075/100,2) incr_amount_a_aponemon from pen_calc_adapod_results_eteaep a where a.account_no = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and a.institution_code = penbat_find_introd_instit_code(:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO) ---για απονεμων and nvl(a.v_percent_ksb,0) <> 0 and nvl(a.average_income,0) <> 0 and year <= 2014 order by 3

dataSource.name: Q_71
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT 'A' DUMMY , B.PENSION_INST_NAME FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS A, COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS B WHERE A.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.DAYS_OR_AMOUNT_FLG ='1' AND A.DHA_DH_INS_DAYS_HAND_INC_SEQNO IS NOT NULL AND A.PENSION_INST_CODE = B.PENSION_INST_CODE UNION SELECT 'B' , A.VALUE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE A WHERE A.title_code='00368' AND A.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND A.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND A.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND A.dec_fact_type_code IN ('00510','00511','00512','00513','00514') ORDER BY 1,2

dataSource.name: Q_72
dataSource.select: SELECT NULL INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, NULL TRANS_DESCR, B.DATE_FROM MIN_DATE, B.DATE_TO MAX_DATE, B.HH SUM_DAYS FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND :p_application_efka_days = 1 AND TEXT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' UNION SELECT PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, MIN(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE ,'810',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'820',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'830',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'840',FROM_WORKING_DATE,TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000),'MM/YYYY'))) MIN_DATE, MAX(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE ,'810',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'820',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'830',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'840',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000),'MM/YYYY')))) MAX_DATE, SUM(nvl(NOTICE_INSURANCE_DAYS,0)+nvl(NOTICE_INS_DAYS_INCR,0)) SUM_DAYS FROM PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES, COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES WHERE PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE=PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.CVR_COVER_CODE IN ('ΤΑΠ') AND 1 = CASE WHEN ( ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA = :P_APPL_YEAR and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PARALLEL_FLG,'0') = '0' ) -- DIADOXIKI THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') = 2 -- AFORA PERIPTOSEIS SYGXWNEFTHENTWN APO OTHONH ATHANASIOU and PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COMMIT_FLG = 2 THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') = '2' and :P_HAS_PREPARE_PROTOCOLS = 0 and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE IS NULL and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR IS NULL and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO IS NULL -- AYTOMATOPOIHMENES/PISTOPOIHMENOI XVRIS PROTOCOLS THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') IN ('1','2','4','3','7') and :P_HAS_PREPARE_PROTOCOLS > 0 and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO -- AYTOMATOPOIHMENES/PISTOPOIHMENOI THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AND :p_application_efka_days = 0 GROUP BY PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE,COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataSource.name: Q_73
dataSource.select: SELECT T.SIGNATURE FROM PEN_DECISION_GOV_SIGNATURES T WHERE T.STATUS = '1'

dataSource.name: Q_74
dataSource.select: SELECT T.LOGO FROM PEN_REPORTS_EFKA_LOGO T WHERE T.STATUS = '1'

dataSource.name: Q_75
dataSource.select: SELECT distinct institution_code inst_a_other_code, b.pension_ika_inst_name inst_a_other_descr, round(a.average_income,2) synt_misthos_a_other, round(a.TOTAL_YEARS_0075,2) eth_asfalisis_a_other, ADD_CONTR_AMOUNT_PLUS_20, MIN(TO_DATE('01'||TRIM(LPAD(A.MONTH,2,0))||A.YEAR, 'DDMMRRRR')) MIN_DATE_PARALLEL, MAX(TO_DATE('01'||TRIM(LPAD(A.MONTH,2,0))||A.YEAR, 'DDMMRRRR')) MAX_DATE_PARALLEL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT_PER_ADD FROM PEN_CALC_0075_RES_ETEAEP_DA A, com_pension_ika_institution b WHERE a.account_no = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND b.pension_ika_inst_code = a.institution_code GROUP BY institution_code,ADD_CONTR_AMOUNT_PLUS_20, round(a.average_income,2),round(a.TOTAL_YEARS_0075,2),b.pension_ika_inst_name,ADAPODOTIKH_AMT_PER_ADD ORDER BY 6,5

dataItem.name: MIN_DATE_PARALLEL
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 01 Trim Lpad A Mon

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( '01' || TRIM ( LPAD ( A.MONTH , 2 , 0 ) ) || A.YEAR , 'DDMMRRRR' ) )

dataItem.name: MAX_DATE_PARALLEL
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max To Date 01 Trim Lpad A Mon

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( TO_DATE ( '01' || TRIM ( LPAD ( A.MONTH , 2 , 0 ) ) || A.YEAR , 'DDMMRRRR' ) )

dataSource.name: Q_76
dataSource.select: select distinct institution_code inst_B_other_code, (select b.pension_ika_inst_name from com_pension_ika_institution b where b.pension_ika_inst_code = a.institution_code) inst_B_other_descr from pen_calc_adapod_results_eteaep a where a.account_no = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and a.institution_code != penbat_find_introd_instit_code(:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO) ---για τους αλλους φορεις and year >= 2015 order by 1

dataSource.name: Q_77
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT 1 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND TEXT NOT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' AND :p_application_efka_days = 1 UNION SELECT DISTINCT 2 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND :p_application_efka_days = 1 AND TEXT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' UNION SELECT DISTINCT 1 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE IS NULL AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR IS NULL AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO IS NULL AND TEXT NOT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' AND :p_application_efka_days = 0 UNION SELECT DISTINCT 2 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE IS NULL AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR IS NULL AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO IS NULL AND :p_application_efka_days = 0 AND TEXT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' ORDER BY 1,3

ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΤΙΚΑ ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ - ΧΡΟΝΟΙ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΓΙΑ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΣΗ

textSegment.string: ΠΟΣΟ Β ( ΧΡΟΝΟΣ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΑΠΟ 01/01/2015 ΚΑΙ ΜΕΤΑ )
ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΠΟΣΟΥ Α' ΑΠΟΝΕΜΟΝΤΑ ΦΟΡΕΑ ( ΧΡΟΝΟΣ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΕΩΣ 31/12/2014 )
ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΠΟΣΟΥ Α' ΠΑΡΑΛΛΗΛΩΝ ΦΟΡΕΩΝ ( ΧΡΟΝΟΣ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΕΩΣ 31/12/2014 )
ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΠΟΣΟΥ Β' ΑΠΟΝΕΜΟΝΤΑ ΦΟΡΕΑ ( ΧΡΟΝΟΣ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΑΠΟ 01/01/2015 ΚΑΙ ΜΕΤΑ )
ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΠΟΣΟΥ Β' ΑΛΛΩΝ ΦΟΡΕΩΝ ( ΧΡΟΝΟΣ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΑΠΟ 01/01/2015 ΚΑΙ ΜΕΤΑ )
ΤΟ ΔΕ ΕΠΙ ΠΛΕΟΝ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΠΡΟΣΑΥΞΗΣΗΣ ΤΕΚΝΩΝ ΑΝΕΡΧΕΤΑΙ ΣΕ
ΠΡΕΠΕΙ, ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΙΣ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘ.
ΕΠΕΙΔΗ Ο/Η ΑΙΤΩΝ/ΟΥΣΑ ΣΥΝΕΧΙΖΕΙ ΤΗΝ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑ ΤΟΥ ΣΤΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ/ΕΥΡΥΤΕΡΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ ΠΡΕΠΕΙ, ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ
ΜΕ ΤΙΣ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘ.16 Ν.3863/10, ΝΑ ΓΙΝΕΙ ΜΕΙΩΣΗ ΚΑΤΑ 70% ΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ Η ΟΠΟΙΑ
ΑΝΑΣΤΕΛΛΟΥΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΚΑΤΑΒΟΛΗ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΑΠΟ
ΕΥΡΩ ΟΠΩΣ ΔΙΑΜΟΡΦΩΘΗΚΕ ΜΕ ΤΙΣ ΑΥΞΗΣΕΙΣ ΑΠΟ
ΑΠΟ ΕΠΟΜΕΝΗΣ ΔΙΑΚΟΠΗΣ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑΣ Η ΤΗ ΣΥΜΠΛΗΡΩΣΗ ΤΟΥ 55ΟΥ ΕΤΟΥΣ ΤΗΣ ΗΛΙΚΙΑΣ, ΤΟ ΚΑΤΑΒΑΛΛΟΜΕΝΟ ΠΟΣΟ
ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΔΙΑΜΟΡΦΩΝΕΤΑΙ ΜΗΧΑΝΟΓΡΑΦΙΚΑ, ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΙΣΧΥΟΥΣΑ ΝΟΜΟΘΕΣΙΑ.
ΕΠΕΙΔΗ Ο ΑΝΩΤΕΡΩ ΣΥΝΕΧΙΖΕΙ ΕΡΓΑΖΟΜΕΝΟΣ ΤΟ ΚΑΤΑΒΑΛΛΟΜΕΝΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ, ΜΕΙΩΝΕΤΑΙ ΚΑΤΑ
60%, ΒΑΣΕΙ ΤΩΝ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΩΝ ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 20 ΤΟΥ Ν.4387/2016.
ΑΝΑΣΤΕΛΛΟΥΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΚΑΤΑΒΟΛΗ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΛΟΓΩ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑΣ ΣΕ ΦΟΡΕΑ ΤΗΣ ΓΕΝΙΚΗΣ ΚΥΒΕΡΝΗΣΗΣ ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ
ΕΠΙΦΥΛΑΣΣΟΜΑΣΤΕ ΓΙΑ ΤΗΝ ΑΝΑΘΕΩΡΗΣΗ ΤΗΣ ΑΠΟΦΑΣΗΣ ΑΥΤΗΣ ΩΣ ΠΡΟΣ ΤΟΝ ΚΑΘΟΡΙΣΜΟ ΤΟΥ ΥΨΟΥΣ:
1.ΤΗΣ ΑΝΤΑΠΟΔΟΤΙΚΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΟ ΔΕΥΤΕΡΟ ΕΔΑΦΙΟ ΤΗΣ ΠΑΡ. 1 ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 30 ΤΟΥ Ν. 4387/2016,
ΣΕ ΠΕΡΙΠΤΩΣΗ ΠΟΥ ΧΟΡΗΓΗΘΗΚΑΝ ΠΟΣΑ ΠΡΟΣΩΡΙΝΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ, ΘΑ ΓΙΝΕΙ ΣΥΜΨΗΦΙΣΜΟΣ ΜΕ ΤΑ ΠΟΣΑ ΠΟΥ ΘΑ
Σε περίπτωση που εξακολουθείτε εργαζόμενος μετά την έναρξη της συνταξιοδότησης και ο εργοδότης σας ανήκει στον ευρύτερο
Δημόσιο τομέα υποχρεούστε να προσκομίσετε άμεσα την απόφαση συνταξιοδότησης στον εργοδότη σας.
Κατά της Απόφασης αυτής μπορείτε να ασκήσετε ένσταση ενώπιον της ΤΔΕ
του Υποκαταστήματος μέσα σε τρίμηνη προθεσμία από την παραλαβή της
ενώπιον του Διοικητικού Πρωτοδικείου εντός 60 ημερών από την ημερομηνία παραλαβής της απόφασης.
Ασκηση ένστασης ενώπιον της ΤΔΕ κατά της Απόφασης του Κύριου Φορέα δεν ισχύει
εκτός από το αίτημα για αύξηση του ποσοστού αναπηρίας, για το οποίο θα πρέπει να προσφύγετε

function CF_TROPOPIITIKI_DOCFormula return Char is CURSOR C1 IS Select Decode(B.document_code,'006','ΤΡΟΠΟΠΟΙΗΣΗΣ' ,'301','ΑΝΑΘΕΩΡΗΣΗΣ' ,'003','ΜΕΤΑΤΡΟΠΗΣ ' ,'002','ΜΕΤΑΤΡΟΠΗΣ ' ,B.document_name ) DOCUMENT_NAME, A.Document_Code From Wrk_In_Out A, WRK_DOCUMENTS B Where A.Protocol_Orgbra_Code = :PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE And A.Protocol_Year = :PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR And A.Protocol_No = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO And Nvl(A.Receive_Appl_Flg,'0') = '1' And A.Type_Flg = '1' And A.Status = '1' And A.Document_Code = B.Document_Code ;
begin OPEN C1; FETCH C1 INTO :CP_DOC_TROP, :CP_DOC_TROP_CODE; CLOSE C1; RETURN ' '; end;
